title: 10 best herbal essential oils for periodontal disease
description: Eucalyptus globulus, also known as Tasmanian blue gum, essential oils helps with periodontal disease because of its potent antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The oil's high concentration of eucalyptol and alpha-pinene helps to reduce bacterial growth and inflammation in the gums, thereby reducing plaque and preventing further damage. Additionally, eucalyptus globulus essential oils have been shown to promote healing and reduce pain in the gums, making it a valuable natural...
